academics.semester: Odd Semester: September to February | Even Semester: February to July
academics.exam_pattern: Continuous Evaluation (CIE) - 50 marks + Final Exam (SEE) - 50 marks. CIE includes 2-3 continuous evaluation tests and assignments
programs: Electronics and Communication (VLSI Design and Technology)

placements.cell_location: GV9H+4WW, K V Shankaragowda Rd, PES College Campus, Mandya, Karnataka 571401 (Beside MBA/MCA block, opposite Admin block)

library.name: Library and Information Center
library.timing_weekday: Lending: 10:00 AM to 5:30 PM | Reference: 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM
library.timing_saturday: Lending: 9:30 AM to 1:30 PM | Reference: 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
library.features: Fully automated & digitized, E-Resources, Remote Access, NPTEL, WEB OPAC

hostel_boys.name: PESCE Boys Hostel
hostel_boys.rooms: 89 single occupancy, 21 double occupancy, 73 triple occupancy
hostel_boys.facilities: Free medical, Library, TV room, Wi-Fi internet connectivity, Solar water heaters, Closed-circuit television (CCTV), Play ground, Vehicle parking facility, Separate mess

hostel_girls.name: PESCE Girls Hostel
hostel_girls.facilities: Free medical, Library, TV room, Wi-Fi internet connectivity, Solar water heaters, Closed-circuit television (CCTV), Play ground, Separate mess

medical.name: Dispensary
medical.facilities: Essential medicines stocked, Bed facilities for rest and observation, 24/7 emergency services

canteen.name: PESCE Canteen
canteen.food_type: Vegetarian and non-vegetarian, Self-service scheme, South Indian, North Indian, Baked products
canteen.restrictions: No soft drinks (Coca-Cola, Pepsi) - Smoke-free campus
canteen.hygiene: Food items served in hygienic conditions at reasonable rates
